comment: Round 5 D5 usage_cost hoist — Flesch-Kincaid grade level of the SKILL.md description frontmatter field. Computed deterministically by count_tokens.flesch_kincaid_grade via count_tokens.skill_md_description_fk_grade (Round 5 Edit A). No external text-analysis library is pulled in — reproducibility across rebuilds is the contract.

input.description_text: Persistent BasicAbility optimization factory. Use when profiling, evaluating, diagnosing, improving, router-testing, or half-retiring a skill/ability per Si-Chip spec v0.1.0.

syllable_heuristic.method: vowel-group regex ([aeiouy]+) with silent-e adjustment (-1 when word ends in 'e', not 'le', length > 3)

sentence_heuristic.method: count of [.!?]+ runs after stripping periods between digits (v0.1.0 → v010)
sentence_heuristic.description_after_digit_strip: Persistent BasicAbility optimization factory. Use when profiling, evaluating, diagnosing, improving, router-testing, or half-retiring a skill/ability per Si-Chip spec v010.

word_heuristic.note_on_v_token: The trailing 'v' in 'v0.1.0' is captured as a single-character word. FK-style analyses count single letters as words (e.g. 'a', 'I'). Does not materially affect the grade.

gate_check.v1_baseline_pass: n/a (U1 has no §4.1 hard threshold; informational / measurement-fill only)

signals_used.name: index_recall
signals_used.implication: Low index_recall on the description retrieval surface motivates treating the description's readability / token density as the first D5 fill (Round 5 priority per master plan.rationale).

signals_used.name: structure_recognition
signals_used.implication: Structure-recognition at 0.75 is acceptable but the 0.20 index_recall is the limiter — description quality (U1) is the upstream lever.

upstream_provenance_nines_signals.master_plan_round_5_rationale: Nines analyze flagged D14 index_recall=0.2 and D15 structure_recognition=0.75 — both are upstream signals that Si-Chip's description quality is the limiting factor, reinforcing the U1 priority.

risk_flag_surfaced.master_plan_risk_flag: FK-grade is an English-prose metric; SKILL.md `description` is short and bilingual-naming-heavy (BasicAbility, router-testing, half-retiring, Si-Chip, v0.1.0). The number may be unflattering — that's OK, surfacing it is the value.
risk_flag_surfaced.interpretation: 19.58 ≥ 12 (graduate-level reading); reflects dense technical vocabulary + compound terms. Dropping below 12 would require paraphrasing the description itself, which is out of scope for Round 5 (body is untouched this round).

determinism_check.rationale: No RNG, no external wordlist, no tokenizer dependency in the FK path. PyYAML (stdlib-adjacent) is only used to extract frontmatter.description; the computation is pure regex + arithmetic.
